requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity — ETDA IoT Security Guidelines (Advisory; No Mandatory Product Certification as of 2026-06-17)
requirement_topic.zh: 网络安全——ETDA物联网安全指南（建议性；截至2026-06-17无强制产品认证）
requirement_topic.zht: 網路安全——ETDA物聯網安全指南（建議性；截至2026-06-17無強制產品認證）

summary.en: Thailand's ETDA (Electronic Transactions Development Agency) has published IoT security guidelines and recommendations for connected devices. As of 2026-06-17, there is no mandatory product-level cybersecurity certification requirement for wireless or IoT devices entering the Thai market. ETDA guidelines are advisory in nature. The Cybersecurity Act BE 2562 establishes a national cybersecurity framework focused on critical information infrastructure but does not currently mandate product-level IoT device certification for market entry. Manufacturers are encouraged to implement ETDA IoT security best practices, covering secure communication, authentication, software update mechanisms, and vulnerability disclosure. The regulatory landscape is evolving and manufacturers should monitor ETDA and NBTC for future mandatory cybersecurity requirements.
summary.zh: 泰国电子交易发展署（ETDA）已发布物联网安全指南及联网设备建议。截至2026年6月17日，进入泰国市场的无线或物联网设备尚无强制性产品级网络安全认证要求。ETDA指南为建议性质。《网络安全法》BE 2562建立了以关键信息基础设施为重点的国家网络安全框架，目前不强制要求物联网设备进行市场准入级产品认证。鼓励制造商实施ETDA物联网安全最佳实践，涵盖安全通信、身份验证、软件更新机制及漏洞披露。监管形势仍在演变，制造商应持续关注ETDA及NBTC的未来强制要求动态。
summary.zht: 泰國電子交易發展署（ETDA）已發布物聯網安全指南及聯網設備建議。截至2026年6月17日，進入泰國市場的無線或物聯網設備尚無強制性產品級網路安全認證要求。ETDA指南為建議性質。《網路安全法》BE 2562建立了以關鍵資訊基礎設施為重點的國家網路安全框架，目前不強制要求物聯網設備進行市場準入級產品認證。鼓勵製造商實施ETDA物聯網安全最佳實踐，涵蓋安全通訊、身份驗證、軟體更新機制及漏洞披露。監管形勢仍在演變，製造商應持續關注ETDA及NBTC的未來強制要求動態。

standards_or_laws: ETDA IoT Security Guidelines (Electronic Transactions Development Agency, Thailand) — advisory
Cybersecurity Act BE 2562 (Thailand) — national cybersecurity framework; does not currently mandate product-level IoT device certification for market entry

summary.en: China has a more developed mandatory cybersecurity framework for network equipment. The Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China (CSL) and related regulations require network products and services to meet security requirements. MIIT network access license (NAL) applications involve security checks. GB/T 22239 (information system security classification) and MIIT security requirements for network equipment provide technical baselines. Mandatory product-level cybersecurity certification for all IoT devices is still evolving in China, but security requirements are embedded in the NAL and other approval processes.
summary.zh: 中国针对网络设备拥有更为完善的强制网络安全框架。《中华人民共和国网络安全法》（CSL）及相关法规要求网络产品和服务满足安全要求。工业和信息化部网络接入许可（NAL）申请涉及安全审查。GB/T 22239（信息系统安全等级保护）及工业和信息化部网络设备安全要求提供技术基准。中国针对所有物联网设备的强制产品级网络安全认证仍在完善中，但安全要求已嵌入NAL及其他审批流程。
summary.zht: 中國針對網路設備擁有更為完善的強制網路安全框架。《中華人民共和國網路安全法》（CSL）及相關法規要求網路產品和服務滿足安全要求。工業和信息化部網路接入許可（NAL）申請涉及安全審查。GB/T 22239（信息系統安全等級保護）及工業和信息化部網路設備安全要求提供技術基準。中國針對所有物聯網設備的強制產品級網路安全認證仍在完善中，但安全要求已嵌入NAL及其他審批流程。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China 2017 (MIIT / CAC)
GB/T 22239 — Information security technology: Baseline for classified protection of cybersecurity (SAC)
MIIT network access license (NAL) security requirements

gap.en: Thailand currently has no mandatory product-level cybersecurity certification requirement for wireless or IoT devices, while China has mandatory security requirements embedded in the MIIT NAL process and broader CSL framework. The gap is asymmetric: Chinese products entering Thailand face no additional mandatory cybersecurity certification requirement beyond the NBTC type approval obligations already required. However, ETDA advisory guidelines represent best-practice expectations that sophisticated Thai enterprise buyers and public procurement bodies may require contractually. Manufacturers should implement ETDA-recommended security features and monitor ETDA and NBTC for future mandatory requirements.
gap.zh: 泰国目前对无线或物联网设备没有强制性产品级网络安全认证要求，而中国则将强制安全要求嵌入工业和信息化部NAL流程及更广泛的CSL框架。差距具有不对称性：进入泰国的中国产品除已有的NBTC型式批准义务外，不存在额外的强制网络安全认证要求。但ETDA建议性指南代表泰国企业采购方及公共采购机构可能在合同中提出的最佳实践期望。制造商应实施ETDA推荐的安全功能，并持续关注ETDA及NBTC的未来强制要求动态。
gap.zht: 泰國目前對無線或物聯網設備沒有強制性產品級網路安全認證要求，而中國則將強制安全要求嵌入工業和信息化部NAL流程及更廣泛的CSL框架。差距具有不對稱性：進入泰國的中國產品除已有的NBTC型式批准義務外，不存在額外的強制網路安全認證要求。但ETDA建議性指南代表泰國企業採購方及公共採購機構可能在合約中提出的最佳實踐期望。製造商應實施ETDA推薦的安全功能，並持續關注ETDA及NBTC的未來強制要求動態。

mandatory_status.target: Advisory only — ETDA IoT security guidelines are not mandatory product certification requirements as of 2026-06-17; no mandatory cybersecurity product certification required for NBTC type approval or Thai market entry; monitor for future changes
mandatory_status.cn: Partially mandatory — security requirements embedded in MIIT NAL and network product approvals under CSL; GB/T 22239 classification framework applies to information systems; mandatory IoT product cybersecurity certification still evolving

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] As of 2026-06-17, Thailand has no mandatory product-level cybersecurity certification for wireless or IoT devices. ETDA IoT security guidelines are advisory only. Chinese manufacturers face no additional mandatory cybersecurity compliance gap for Thai market entry beyond the NBTC type approval already required. Implementing ETDA-recommended security features (secure communication, authentication, update mechanisms, vulnerability disclosure) is best practice and may be contractually required by Thai enterprise buyers or public procurement. Monitor ETDA and NBTC announcements for future mandatory requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年6月17日，泰国对无线或物联网设备没有强制性产品级网络安全认证要求，ETDA物联网安全指南仅为建议性质。中国制造商进入泰国市场除已要求的NBTC型式批准外，不存在额外的强制网络安全合规差距。实施ETDA推荐的安全功能（安全通信、身份验证、更新机制、漏洞披露）是最佳实践，泰国企业采购方或公共采购机构可能在合同中提出要求。请持续关注ETDA及NBTC公告以了解未来强制要求动态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年6月17日，泰國對無線或物聯網設備沒有強制性產品級網路安全認證要求，ETDA物聯網安全指南僅為建議性質。中國製造商進入泰國市場除已要求的NBTC型式批准外，不存在額外的強制網路安全合規差距。實施ETDA推薦的安全功能（安全通訊、身份驗證、更新機制、漏洞披露）是最佳實踐，泰國企業採購方或公共採購機構可能在合約中提出要求。請持續關注ETDA及NBTC公告以了解未來強制要求動態。
